description_long: This is a low-top athletic sneaker primarily constructed from white synthetic leather with a pink Nike Swoosh logo on both sides. The shoe features a rounded toe box with perforations for breathability, white laces in a standard criss-cross pattern, and a padded collar for comfort. The heel tab is pink and displays the word 'NIKE' in white block letters. The midsole and outsole are white, with some visible signs of dirt and wear, indicating regular use. The overall silhouette is classic and streamlined, suitable for casual or sporty urban environments. The shoe appears to be designed for everyday wear, offering both style and functionality.
description: A white and pink Nike sneaker with a perforated toe box, pink Swoosh, and visible signs of wear. Features standard lacing and a padded collar for comfort.
description_view_0: Side view showing the pink Nike Swoosh, white laces, and perforated toe box.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded, perforated toe box and lacing system.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the pink Swoosh and visible heel tab.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the pink heel tab with 'NIKE' text and padded collar.
attribute_logo: Pink Nike Swoosh on both sides; white 'NIKE' text on pink heel tab
